_comment_howto: RTDB security rules for the Melakhim Bagrut app.
HOW TO DEPLOY (one time, from a machine with Firebase CLI installed):
3. firebase init database        # select the same project as the app
# choose this file as the rules file
Alternatively, copy the 'rules' block below (without the _comment_*
keys) into the Firebase Console → Realtime Database → Rules tab, and
_comment_structure: - A signed-in user can read/write ONLY their own users/{uid}/*.
- Anyone can still read the classes/* board (keeps current leaderboard
behaviour). If you want to lock that down too, replace the classes
rules below with '.read': 'auth != null' and '.write': 'auth != null'.
